nativeProps: HTML div attributes except owned children and change/value props

compositionPolicy.publicComponents: Composes canonical Button and Calendar items plus native form and filtering controls.
compositionPolicy.adapter: Consumers own time-zone conversion, persistence, permissions, recurrence, attendees and notifications.
compositionPolicy.enhancements: Timezone context, duration summary, conflict guidance and change announcements are independently selectable.
compositionPolicy.maturity: The source and rendered root identify Scheduler Kit as Beta; it must not be promoted to Stable without evidence.
